entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed and food crop grown in Andhra Pradesh, India

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where groundnut is grown as a rainfed crop

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Andhra Pradesh is located

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITION
entities.description: Growing conditions dependent on rainfall during the rainy season

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A major abiotic stress affecting the yield and quality of rainfed groundnut

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which is negatively affected by drought

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The standard of the crop produced, which is affected by drought

entities.name: IRRADIANCE
entities.description: A location-specific environmental factor affecting yield losses

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A location-specific environmental factor affecting yield losses

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output per unit area in the rainy season

entities.name: ABHAYA
entities.description: A high-yielding and drought-tolerant variety of groundnut
